title: psychotria saltiensis
intro: Psychotria saltiensis, also known as Kava-kava or Tonga Kava, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots are used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related disorders due to its active compounds, including kavalactones and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Psychotria saltiensis are attributed to its ability to relax muscles, reduce inflammation, and promote a sense of calmness and well-being, contributing to its use in treating various health conditions, including high blood pressure and muscle spasms. Traditionally, the plant's roots are prepared as an herbal tea or tincture by steeping the dried roots in hot water or alcohol to create a liquid extract, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
